Workbench registers as workbench.foundation Shay context provider
proved: Workbench Shay context provider passed live UI proof
remaining_work: Default-shell cutover (replace old Studio shell with Workbench)
Media Studio control unification between prompt-first surface and production mini-app

memory_candidates.title: Workbench shell is the chassis; new domains mount as left-rail entries
memory_candidates.body: The frozen seven-domain Workbench shell is the canonical UI rulebook. Any new product domain (Ops, Build, Plan, etc.) mounts inside it as a left-rail entry rather than launching its own shell.
